response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his expertise leans heavily toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, DLang) with limited recent or in-depth C++ experience. His background includes industrial automation only marginally (National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), and there is no evidence of work with message brokers, concurrent/networked systems, or IEC 62443 standards. His focus on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Google does not align with the required C++ and industrial automation focus.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and cross-domain adaptability
Extensive experience in scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Active open-source contributor and technical educator (workshops, talks)
concerns: Lack of recent or deep C++ experience (last significant C/C++ work was ~10 years ago)
No demonstrated expertise in message brokers, multi-threading, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443)
Minimal alignment with industrial automation or on-premises/cloud platform solutions for automation machinery
